sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98122" key="sukotragi/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡκο-τρᾰγίδης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n98122.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fig-nibbler</tr_>, comic nickname for a miser, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:194" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">194</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:134" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">134</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
